templates.name: Does the breaded eggplant have the skin on or was the skin removed?
templates.content: The skin is removed from the breaded eggplant.

templates.name: What is the shelf life of meat once it is fully thawed?
templates.content: Generally, meat should be consumed within 3-4 days after being thawed, but we recommend eating meat within 3 days for the best quality, taste, and experience.

templates.name: What is the shelf life of fish once it is fully thawed?
templates.content: Generally, fish should be consumed within 2-3- days after being thawed, but we recommend eating fish within 2 days for the best quality, taste, and experience.

templates.name: How should I thaw my order?
templates.content: We recommend thawing your New York Steak & Seafood Co. products in the refrigerator for 24 hours prior to cooking for the best possible quality, taste, and experience.

templates.name: What does USDA Prime mean?
templates.content:
Great question! USDA Prime beef represents the top 2% of all beef in the United States. These cuts are recognized notably for their superior marbling, flavoring, and tenderness and are cut with care by our expert butchers. 

Many competitors will try to fool you with tricky wording with words like "choice" and "angus" but if you're not seeing "USDA Prime," you're not getting the very best. For a truly exquisite steak experience, try our USDA Prime Steaks here: https://newyorksteak.com/pages/usda-prime-steaks

templates.name: Why isn't there any ice in my cooler?
templates.content: Most deliveries will arrive with the dry ice fully evaporated but the food will still be frozen or very cold and be safely placed in your freezer for future use. Your order will stay frozen for up to 24 hours without dry ice. If there is any dry ice left, please dispose of it outdoors and away from children and pets.

templates.name: Can I schedule my order to be delivered at a later date?
templates.content: Yes! With our easy online ordering delivery scheduler, you can select the date for your order to be received. Please note the requested delivery date is not guaranteed. We will do our best to accommodate your request but your order may arrive a day earlier or 1-2 days later than your request.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/newyorksteakco/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/NewYorkSteakCo/

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://newyorksteak.com/pages/refund-policy

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Orders placed by 12 Eastern time generally ship the same day. After 12 noon they ship the next day. We cannot ship over the weekend due to the perishable nature of our gourmet products and because UPS and FedEx don't count the weekends as transit days.

templates.name: Can I ship my order to a PO Box?
templates.content: No. Unfortunately, we cannot ship to a PO Box. We require a physical street address for UPS delivery

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at (718-888-1940) or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: How is my order shipped?
templates.content: We ship your order in extra thick recycled and reusable polyurethane foam containers with enough dry ice to keep it frozen regardless of the temperature or even a 1-day delay.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us by filling out the form here: https://newyorksteak.com/pages/contact and my team will get back to you right away.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: If you're a first-time customer, you can use promo code SHIPSAVE to receive a $19.99 shipping discount on your order over $149.

templates.name: Do you send only 1 slice of cake or do you send the whole cake?
templates.content: While the picture is a slice, we do send a full cake.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to check if you can cancel or edit your order is to email us by filling out the form here: https://newyorksteak.com/pages/contact Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Where do you ship?
templates.content: We ship to all 48 contiguous United States. We also offer special shipping rates to Alaska and Hawaii, for more info email us by filling out the form here: https://newyorksteak.com/pages/contact and my team will get back to you right away.
